display.purpose: Page titles and modal titles. Appears once per screen.

title.purpose: Section headings, card titles in standalone views.

body.purpose: All Thai prose, list content, form descriptions. Line-height 1.7 is non-negotiable.

label.purpose: Form labels, table cell content, action labels. The workhorse weight.

caption.purpose: Timestamps, file sizes, secondary metadata, form hints.

table-header.purpose: Column labels only — uppercase, tracked, Pale Stone. Never in running text.

mono.purpose: Document number codes and version strings in #F5F3F0 chip. Never in prose.

shadows.name: surface-rest
shadows.purpose: Cards and content panels at rest. Establishes float over Faculty Paper.

shadows.name: hover-lift
shadows.purpose: Card hover state. Applied with translateY(-1px) to reinforce lift.

shadows.name: modal
shadows.purpose: Dialog overlays. Maximum shadow in the system.

shadows.name: btn-primary
shadows.purpose: Ember glow under primary buttons at rest.

shadows.name: btn-primary-hover
shadows.purpose: Ember glow under primary buttons on hover.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for all state transitions (borders, backgrounds, shadows).

motion.name: ease-entrance
motion.purpose: Entrance animations: modal slideUp, auth card, change-password popup. Slight overshoot.

motion.name: duration-micro
motion.purpose: Micro-interactions: hover fills, border color shifts.

breakpoints.name: compact
breakpoints.purpose: Mobile nav switch; sidebar hides; bottom nav appears.

breakpoints.name: tablet
breakpoints.purpose: Two-column detail layout collapses to single column.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The one action per screen that matters most. Ember gradient, glow shadow, lift on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 6px; padding: 10px 18px; border-radius: 10px; font-family: 'Noto Sans Thai', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; color: #fff; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #E83A00 0%, #FF5520 100%); border: 1.5px solid transparent; box-shadow: 0 4px 14px rgba(232,58,0,.32); cursor: pointer; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1; transition: all .2s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #C03200 0%, #E83A00 100%); transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 8px 22px rgba(232,58,0,.4); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(0); box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(232,58,0,.25); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: .4; cursor: not-allowed; pointer-events: none; }

components.name: Soft Button
components.description: Neutral cancel / low-priority action. Warm grey, no color commitment.
components.css: .ds-btn-soft { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 6px; padding: 10px 18px; border-radius: 10px; font-family: 'Noto Sans Thai', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; color: #6b6560; background: #F5F3F0; border: 1.5px solid #E8E4DE; cursor: pointer; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1; transition: all .2s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1); } .ds-btn-soft:hover { background: #ECEAE6; } .ds-btn-soft:disabled { opacity: .4; cursor: not-allowed; pointer-events: none; }

components.name: Danger Button
components.description: Destructive or rejection action. Rejection Red with glow. Never sits next to a Primary button without separation.
components.css: .ds-btn-danger { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 6px; padding: 10px 18px; border-radius: 10px; font-family: 'Noto Sans Thai', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; color: #fff; background: #DC2626; border: 1.5px solid transparent; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(220,38,38,.25); cursor: pointer; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1; transition: all .2s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1); } .ds-btn-danger:hover { background: #B91C1C; transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 4px 14px rgba(220,38,38,.35); } .ds-btn-danger:active { transform: translateY(0); } .ds-btn-danger:disabled { opacity: .4; cursor: not-allowed; pointer-events: none; }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Form input at rest and focus. Ember focus ring signals the active field.
components.css: .ds-fg { margin-bottom: 16px; } .ds-fl { display: block; font-family: 'Noto Sans Thai', sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; color: #6b6560; margin-bottom: 6px; letter-spacing: .2px; } .ds-req { color: #E83A00; margin-left: 2px; } .ds-fi { width: 100%; padding: 12px 14px; border: 1.5px solid #E8E4DE; border-radius: 11px; font-family: 'Noto Sans Thai', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; color: #18120E; background: #FAFAF8; outline: none; transition: all .2s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1); box-sizing: border-box; } .ds-fi:focus { border-color: #E83A00; background: #fff; box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px rgba(232,58,0,.1); } .ds-fi::placeholder { color: #C0BAB4; }

components.name: Card
components.description: The primary content container. Warm Canvas header band, Document White body, ambient shadow at rest.
components.html:
หัวข้อการ์ด
เนื้อหาของการ์ด
components.css: .ds-card { background: #FDFDFC; border-radius: 14px; border: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,.055); box-shadow: 0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,.05), 0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,.07); overflow: hidden; transition: box-shadow .22s, transform .22s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1); } .ds-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.08), 0 12px 32px rgba(0,0,0,.1); transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-card-head { padding: 14px 18px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,.05); font-family: 'Noto Sans Thai', sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; color: #18120E; background: #FAFAF8; } .ds-card-body { padding: 18px; font-family: 'Noto Sans Thai', sans-serif; font-size: 15px; color: #18120E; line-height: 1.7; }

components.name: Status Badge
components.description: Document status chip. Leading color dot ensures status is never conveyed by color alone.
components.html: รออนุมัติ เสร็จสิ้น ส่งคืนแก้ไข
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; padding: 3px 10px; border-radius: 20px; font-family: 'Noto Sans Thai', sans-serif; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; white-space: nowrap; letter-spacing: .1px; } .ds-bdot { width: 5px; height: 5px; border-radius: 50%; background: currentColor; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-b-pending { background: #FFFBEB; color: #B45309; } .ds-b-signed { background: #F0FDF4; color: #15803D; border: 1px solid #BBF7D0; } .ds-b-rejected { background: #FEF2F2; color: #B91C1C; } .ds-b-draft { background: #EFF6FF; color: #1D4ED8; }

components.name: Alert
components.description: System feedback strip. Four semantic variants; each uses the full bg/border/text triad from the status palette.
components.html:
✓อนุมัติเรียบร้อยแล้ว ส่งอีเมลแจ้งทุกคนแล้ว
!กรุณาออกเลขที่หนังสือก่อนดำเนินการต่อ
components.css: .ds-al { padding: 12px 15px; border-radius: 10px; font-family: 'Noto Sans Thai', sans-serif; font-size: 13px; display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 9px; line-height: 1.55; } .ds-al-icon { font-size: 15px; flex-shrink: 0; margin-top: 1px; } .ds-al-ok { background: #F0FDF4; color: #15803D; border: 1px solid #BBF7D0; } .ds-al-er { background: #FEF2F2; color: #B91C1C; border: 1px solid #FECACA; } .ds-al-wa { background: #FFFBEB; color: #B45309; border: 1px solid #FDE68A; } .ds-al-in { background: #EFF6FF; color: #1D4ED8; border: 1px solid #BFDBFE; }

components.name: Upload Zone
components.description: Drag-and-drop file drop target. Warm Canvas at rest, Morning Warmth hover. Never cool grey.
components.html:
ลากไฟล์มาวางที่นี่ หรือคลิกเพื่อเลือก

รองรับ PDF, Word, รูปภาพ (สูงสุด 10 MB)
components.css: .ds-upload-zone { border: 2px dashed #EBEBEB; border-radius: 16px; padding: 24px; cursor: pointer; transition: all .2s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-height: 180px; background: #FAFAF8; } .ds-upload-zone:hover { border-color: #E83A00; background: #fff8f4; } .ds-upload-inner { text-align: center; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 8px; } .ds-upload-icon { width: 48px; height: 48px; color: #18120E; opacity: .25; stroke-width: 1.5; margin-bottom: 6px; } .ds-upload-text { font-family: 'Noto Sans Thai', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: #18120E; } .ds-upload-hint { font-family: 'Noto Sans Thai', sans-serif; font-size: 12px; color: #a89e99; }

narrative.overview:
SaEDU Flow is an administrative system that must feel as trustworthy as an official stamp and as approachable as a senior student's advice. The visual system is built around a single sustained warmth: a near-black navigation bar of charred brown (#100800), warm off-white working surfaces (#F4F2EF), and one ember-orange accent (#E83A00) that appears exactly where the system needs the user's attention. The warmth is not cosmetic. It comes from the tinted neutrals: the background, the text, the shadows, the borders, all lean toward the orange-red hue at near-zero chroma. The room feels like a well-kept faculty office, not a startup dashboard.

This system explicitly rejects what PRODUCT.md names as anti-references: the dense grey tables of old Thai government portals, the English-defaulting neon-accent SaaS aesthetic, and anything that feels heavy or intimidating to a first-year student. It also rejects the opposite trap: a design so sanitised it reads as foreign, like a generic Western admin tool that happens to contain Thai text.

Color strategy is Restrained: tinted neutrals carry the surface, the ember accent appears on primary actions and current selections only. Depth is expressed through tonal layering (bg to card-head to white) reinforced by gentle diffuse shadows. Motion is state-feedback only: lift on hover, focus glow on inputs, no choreographed entrances.
keyCharacteristics: Single-family typography (Noto Sans Thai) from nav labels to table headers, with IBM Plex Mono for document numbers and codes
Warm off-white working surface (#F4F2EF) — never pure white, never cool grey
Near-black charcoal sidebar (#100800) as the frame, ember accent as the guide
Status vocabulary (ok/error/warning/info) with full bg/border/text triads for every state
Line-height 1.7 minimum for all body Thai text; 1.55 minimum for compact UI text

rules.name: The One Ember Rule
rules.body: The primary #E83A00 appears on at most 10% of any given screen. A primary button, an active tab underline, a focus ring. Never as a background fill, decorative stripe, or illustration color. Its rarity makes it directional.

rules.name: The Tinted Neutral Rule
rules.body: No pure greys. Every neutral token leans toward the orange hue at chroma 0.005–0.015. If a new neutral is needed, sample from the existing warm scale; do not introduce a cool or blue-shifted grey.

rules.name: The Single Family Rule
rules.body: Noto Sans Thai is the only type family for UI text. Display pairings, serif headlines, and geometric display fonts are prohibited. Hierarchy is built through weight and size alone.

rules.name: The 1.7 Floor Rule
rules.body: Body and label text for Thai content must have line-height ≥ 1.7. This is not a preference; it is a legibility requirement for Thai letterforms with top diacritics.

rules.name: The Ambient Floor Rule
rules.body: Cards always have a resting shadow. Flat cards are forbidden; they dissolve into the Faculty Paper background and lose their interactive affordance. The shadow is the affordance.

rules.name: The Deepening Stack Rule
rules.body: Shadow intensity increases strictly with layer elevation: bg (no shadow) < card rest < card hover < dropdown < modal. Never use a heavier shadow at a lower elevation.

rules.name: The Stat Card Quarantine Rule
rules.body: The colored gradient stat cards (.card-soft with .green/.blue/.pink/.orange) are permitted exclusively on the dashboard stats row. They must not appear in document lists, admin panels, or any context where they would compete with the semantic status vocabulary.

dos: Do use Noto Sans Thai for all user-facing text, including buttons, labels, table headers, and form hints.
Do set body and label line-height to 1.7 minimum for any Thai text in running prose or multi-line UI labels.
Do pair every status color with a non-color signal: the .bdot dot in badges, an icon in alerts, a text label in timeline dots.
Do use the tonal layering (Faculty Paper bg → Warm Canvas header → Document White body) as the primary depth signal before adding shadows.
Do keep #E83A00 to ≤10% of any screen surface. Its authority is proportional to its rarity.
Do use cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1) for all state transitions. Duration 150–220ms for micro-interactions, 200–280ms for panel entrances.
Do write all user-facing copy in Thai. Never mix English labels into Thai UI except for proper nouns.
Do give every empty state a Thai instructional sentence: what the empty list means and what the user should do next.
Do use the dark-to-ember gradient (#1c0a03 → #E83A00) exclusively for the auth card header and the change-password popup header.
donts: Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe on cards, list items, callouts, or alerts.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text with a gradient fill) in any new component. The auth header is a legacy exception; it must not be replicated.
Don't introduce cool-shifted or blue-tinted neutrals. Every new grey must be sampled from the warm neutral scale.
Don't use backdrop-filter blur decoratively — only on the modal overlay and mobile nav for functional readability.
Don't build layouts that feel like old Thai government systems: dense tables, Times New Roman, no row hover states.
Don't default to English-first SaaS patterns: neon accents, gradient hero metrics, startup-speak copy, identical card grids.
Don't use the hero-metric template (big number, small label, gradient accent) on any dashboard stat.
Don't reduce Midnight Carbon (#100800) to plain black (#000 or #111).
Don't use cool grey for drag-and-drop upload zones. Use #FAFAF8 at rest and #fff8f4 on hover.
Don't extend the .card-soft gradient stat card pattern outside the dashboard stats row.
